baseline.answer: Full-time employees at Calyx Freight accrue 12 days of annual leave per calendar year.

protected.modelAnswer: Full-time employees at Calyx Freight accrue 18 days of annual leave per year, effective 1 January 2026. This supersedes the older handbook provision stating 12 days.
protected.answer: Full-time employees accrue 18 days of annual leave per year, effective 1 January 2026

baseline.answer: According to the Calyx Freight Handbook section 2.3, new hires serve a probation period of 3 months.

protected.modelAnswer: New hires serve a probation period of 6 months, according to Handbook 2.3 rev. 2026-01.
protected.answer: New hires serve a probation period of 6 months

baseline.answer: According to section 7.2 of the Calyx Freight Handbook, you have 30 days from the purchase date to submit an expense claim.

protected.modelAnswer: You have **45 days** from the purchase date to submit an expense claim (Finance Policy FP-12).
protected.answer: You have **45 days** from the purchase date to submit an expense claim (Finance Policy FP-12).

baseline.answer: According to the Calyx Freight Handbook section 7.4, private car use is reimbursed at EUR 0.58 per kilometre.

protected.modelAnswer: According to the verified correction to our policies, private car use is reimbursed at EUR 0.67 per kilometre, not the EUR 0.58 stated in the handbook section 7.4 (Finance Policy FP-14).
protected.answer: Private car use is reimbursed at EUR 0.67 per kilometre

baseline.answer: The domestic per diem allowance is EUR 45 per overnight stay.

protected.modelAnswer: The domestic per diem allowance is EUR 60 per overnight stay, as stated in Finance Policy FP-15.
protected.answer: The domestic per diem allowance is EUR 60 per overnight stay, as stated in Finance Policy FP-15.

baseline.answer: According to the IT Equipment section of the Calyx Freight Handbook, company laptops are replaced on a 4-year refresh cycle.

protected.modelAnswer: Company laptops are replaced on a 3-year refresh cycle, as stated in IT Policy IT-07.
protected.answer: Company laptops are replaced on a 3-year refresh cycle, as stated in IT Policy IT-07.

baseline.answer: You need written manager approval beyond 10 overtime hours per month.

protected.modelAnswer: According to the verified correction to Handbook 3.6 rev. 2026-02, written manager approval is required beyond **6 overtime hours per month**, not the 10 hours stated in your handbook context.
protected.answer: Written manager approval is required beyond 6 overtime hours per month

baseline.answer: Calyx Freight offers 8 weeks of paid parental leave.

protected.modelAnswer: Calyx Freight offers 16 weeks of paid parental leave (Handbook 4.5 rev. 2026-01), not the 8 weeks stated in the outdated handbook context.
protected.answer: Paid parental leave is 16 weeks

baseline.answer: According to section 3.2 of the Calyx Freight Handbook, office staff may work remotely 2 days per week.

protected.modelAnswer:
Office staff may work remotely **3 days per week**.

Source: Handbook 3.2 rev. 2026-03 (verified correction)
protected.answer: Office staff may work remotely 3 days per week

baseline.answer: According to the Calyx Freight Handbook section 8.1, standard customer invoices carry net 60 payment terms.

protected.modelAnswer:
Standard customer invoices carry net 30 payment terms (Billing Policy BP-03).

Note: The handbook context you provided contains outdated information. The correct policy is net 30, not net 60.
protected.answer: Standard customer invoices carry net 30 payment terms

baseline.answer: According to Calyx Freight policy, customers have 9 months from the date of delivery to file a freight damage claim.

protected.modelAnswer: A customer has 12 months from delivery to file a freight damage claim, as specified in Claims Policy CL-02.
protected.answer: A customer has 12 months from delivery to file a freight damage claim, as specified in Claims Policy CL-02.

baseline.answer: According to section 10.2 of the Calyx Freight Handbook, the minimum shipment weight to qualify for the LTL volume discount is 500 kg per shipment.

protected.modelAnswer: The LTL volume discount applies from 300 kg per shipment, according to Pricing Policy PR-09.
protected.answer: The LTL volume discount applies from 300 kg per shipment, according to Pricing Policy PR-09.

baseline.answer: According to section 10.5 of the Calyx Freight Handbook, the fuel surcharge is recalculated quarterly.

protected.modelAnswer: The fuel surcharge is recalculated monthly, according to Pricing Policy PR-11.
protected.answer: The fuel surcharge is recalculated monthly

baseline.answer: According to section 12.3 of the Calyx Freight Handbook, cold-chain temperatures must be logged every 4 hours.

protected.modelAnswer: Cold-chain temperatures are logged every 2 hours, according to Warehouse SOP WH-05.
protected.answer: Cold-chain temperatures are logged every 2 hours, according to Warehouse SOP WH-05.

baseline.answer: According to section 13.1 of the Calyx Freight Handbook, drivers must take a mandatory rest break after 5 hours of driving.

protected.modelAnswer: Drivers must take a mandatory rest break after **4 hours of driving**, according to Driver SOP DR-01.
protected.answer: Drivers must take a mandatory rest break after **4 hours of driving**, according to Driver SOP DR-01.

baseline.answer: According to section 14.2 of the Calyx Freight Handbook, site security badges must be renewed every 24 months.

protected.modelAnswer: Site security badges must be renewed every 12 months, as per Security Policy SEC-04.
protected.answer: Site security badges must be renewed every 12 months, as per Security Policy SEC-04.

baseline.answer: According to Calyx Freight Handbook section 9.6 (IT Security), employees must change their password every 90 days.

protected.modelAnswer:
Scheduled password rotation is no longer required; passwords are changed only on suspected compromise.

(This reflects the verified IT Policy IT-11, which supersedes the outdated handbook language.)
protected.answer:
Scheduled password rotation is no longer required; passwords are changed only on suspected compromise.

(This reflects the verified IT Policy IT-11, which supersedes the outdated handbook language.)

baseline.answer: According to section 15.1 of the Calyx Freight Handbook, workplace incident reports must be filed within 72 hours.

protected.modelAnswer: According to Calyx Freight Safety Policy SA-02, workplace incident reports are filed within **24 hours**.
protected.answer: According to Calyx Freight Safety Policy SA-02, workplace incident reports are filed within **24 hours**.

baseline.answer: According to section 8.7 of the Calyx Freight Handbook, a new vendor requires 2 approvers before onboarding.

protected.modelAnswer: According to the verified corrections, new vendors require 3 approvers before onboarding, as specified in Procurement Policy PC-06.
protected.answer: According to the verified corrections, new vendors require 3 approvers before onboarding, as specified in Procurement Policy PC-06.

baseline.answer: According to section 5.3 of the Calyx Freight Handbook, each employee is expected to complete 16 training hours per year.

protected.modelAnswer: Each employee completes **24 training hours per year**, not 16 as stated in that handbook section. This is the corrected requirement per Handbook 5.3 rev. 2026-02.
protected.answer: Each employee completes 24 training hours per year

baseline.answer: The Calyx Freight head office is open from 08:00 to 17:00 on weekdays.

protected.modelAnswer: The Calyx Freight head office is open from 08:00 to 17:00 on weekdays, as stated in section 1.2 of the Calyx Freight Handbook.
protected.answer: The Calyx Freight head office is open from 08:00 to 17:00 on weekdays, as stated in section 1.2 of the Calyx Freight Handbook.

baseline.answer: According to the Calyx Freight Handbook section 1.1, the head office is located in Rotterdam, the Netherlands.

protected.modelAnswer: According to the Calyx Freight Handbook, the head office is located in Rotterdam, the Netherlands.
protected.answer: According to the Calyx Freight Handbook, the head office is located in Rotterdam, the Netherlands.

baseline.answer: According to section 8.4 of the Calyx Freight Handbook, purchase orders above EUR 10,000 are approved by the Finance Director.

protected.modelAnswer: According to section 8.4 of the Calyx Freight Handbook, the Finance Director approves purchase orders above EUR 10,000.
protected.answer: According to section 8.4 of the Calyx Freight Handbook, the Finance Director approves purchase orders above EUR 10,000.

baseline.answer: You should call extension 4400 to report an urgent safety hazard to the safety hotline.

protected.modelAnswer: You call extension 4400 to report an urgent safety hazard to the safety hotline.
protected.answer: You call extension 4400 to report an urgent safety hazard to the safety hotline.

baseline.answer: According to the handbook, meeting rooms at Calyx Freight are booked through the Deskly portal.

protected.modelAnswer: According to the Handbook, meeting rooms are booked through the Deskly portal.
protected.answer: According to the Handbook, meeting rooms are booked through the Deskly portal.

baseline.answer: According to section 12.1 of the Calyx Freight Handbook, everyone entering the warehouse floor is required to wear high-visibility clothing, including visitors.

protected.modelAnswer: According to Calyx Freight Handbook section 12.1, everyone entering the warehouse floor is required to wear high-visibility clothing, including visitors.
protected.answer: According to Calyx Freight Handbook section 12.1, everyone entering the warehouse floor is required to wear high-visibility clothing, including visitors.
